## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on ongoing tasks and priorities for GrowthX website development and related projects.](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pricing page is nearly complete; demo page and AI-led growth page are next priorities](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Performance optimization for GrowthX site needed (currently low scores)](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Aim to complete current tasks by end of week, leaving time for testing](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Long-term considerations: CMS integration, brand cohesion, and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

## Topics

### Website Development Progress

  - [Pricing page:](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
      - [Nearly complete with improved logo display and table design](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [Minor tweaks needed (e.g., text adjustments for one-line descriptions)](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Demo page:](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
      - [Utilizes Default for routing logic and iframe integration](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [Styling needed for the non-iframe half of the page](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [AI-led growth page:](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [Design in progress by Mergem](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [Will be a single page with button likely linked to Default or Typeform](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Sticking with Next.js for tech stack, particularly for TechStock project](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Future considerations for logged-in experience and course platform integration](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Performance optimization needed for GrowthX site (currently low scores)](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [Plan to address after launch week](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
      - [Potential issues with tracking scripts and lack of optimization](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)

  - [Aim to complete current tasks by end of week for testing buffer](https://fathom.video/share/rMeUpRBaRQwzKynua2ydgdfEWXyKucXx?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
